name: @gitgecko/plug-rules-baseline-pack
description: The second rules plug (INV-2.3 proving plug) — fits the rules socket alongside plug-rules-evaluators. Ships a pack of pre-built lexical rules for common security/baseline defect patterns: hardcoded secrets, eval usage, disabled TLS, dangerous innerHTML, SQL string concatenation. Each rule is a lexical contribution that the rules engine evaluates. Proves the non-exclusive interchangeability invariant: both plugs register 'evaluate' contributions and coexist without conflict.
